title: A Supplement to the Biography of 'Umar b. 'Abd al-'Aziz That Is Not Part of Abu ja 'far's jal-Tabari'sj Book, to the Beginning of the Caliphate of Yazid b. 'Abd al -Malik b. Marwan
description: al-'Aziz That Is Not Part of Abu Ja'far's (al-Tabari's/ Book, to the Beginning of the Caliphate of Yazid b. 'Abd al-Malik b. Marwnn According to 'Abdallah b. Bakr b. Habib al-Sahmi: We were told by a man in the mosque of al-Junabidh346 that 'Umar b. 'Abd al-'Aziz delivered a sermon to the people in Khuna^irah in which he said: 0 people, you were not created in vain, nor will you be left to yourselves 347 Rather, you will return to a place in which God will descend in order to judge among you and distinguish between you.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 24
